subject: ragdoll readiness update for Canberra | Frida Kahlo | Q2 review | INIT-7389
body: Following yesterday's call, the ragdoll effort in Canberra needs prompt confirmation. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Alexander Fleming seems to disagree with Frida Kahlo on key points due to historical perspectives. Reference initiative INIT-7389. Escalate blockers directly if they affect delivery this week. Tracking tags: readiness, delivery.
